---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a local-core capability or contributor workflow improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

Describe the current limitation or missing capability.

## Proposed change

Describe the smallest useful behavior that should be added.

## Scope

- [ ] portable core
- [ ] Linux adapter
- [ ] voice pipeline
- [ ] MCP or tray surface
- [ ] setup or packaging
- [ ] documentation only

## Safety and platform impact

Note any confirmation, undo, planner, or desktop-integration impact.

## Verification idea

Describe the tests, CLI probes, or Linux smoke checks that should prove the
feature works.
